dialog.title: Create portfolio
dialog.description: Give your portfolio a name and set up its first securities account and cash account.

advanced.description: Add extra cash accounts (for multi-currency portfolios). You can also add these later in the Accounts section.

errors.duplicateName: Each account must have a unique name.
